About the Game

A Competitive Game
With a Real Message

The Future Farmer Card Game is a strategic game where players race to build resilient, productive farms that generate ecosystem service credits (PES): the currency that wins the game.

Along the way, you’ll weather droughts, pests, and economic recessions while leveraging agroforestry, food forests, and cutting-edge innovations. Fun, fast, and surprisingly educational.

The game is inspired by real farmers around the world who are trying to make a difference: people who choose agroforestry over monoculture, who plant trees instead of burning them, and who prove every day that resilience and productivity can go hand in hand.

Fun, Inspiring, Strategic.

How to Play

From Seed to Victory

Five simple steps.
Endless strategies.

1

Deal Your Starting Hand

Each player draws 5 cards at the start. The deck goes face-down in the centre of the table.

Setup
2

Take Your Turn

Draw 1 card, then play 1 card: a Farm Module to earn credits, an Innovation to power up, or a Challenge to disrupt opponents.

Each Turn
3

Manage Your Hand

Your hand must always end at exactly 5 cards. Discard down to 5 before your turn ends.

Each Turn
4

Survive the Challenges

Opponents can throw wildfires, floods, and recessions at you. Protect your farm with smart Innovations.

Watch Out
5

First to 15 PES Credits Wins

Build a diverse, resilient farm that generates ecosystem credits faster than your rivals. Adjust the target to change game length.

Victory
What’s in the Deck

Three Types of Cards

Every card has a role. Manage your farm, outsmart rivals, and brace for the unexpected.

🌾
Farm Modules
Build Your Farm

Implement real agricultural activities on your farm. Each generates PES credits. Diversity and resilience pay off.

18 cards · 1–5 PES each
Food ForestAgroforestryRice+FishBeekeepingWoodlotHedgerows
💡
Innovations
Power Up

A farmer’s most powerful tools. Protect your farm, unlock strategies, or block incoming Challenges at the perfect moment.

22 cards · Power & Protection
IrrigationNo TillageCover CropsInsuranceGMOsPrecision Farming
🌊
Challenges
Shake Things Up

The environment is unpredictable. Deploy these at the right moment to devastate rivals or force everyone to adapt.

14 cards · Disruptive Events
WildfireDroughtHeatwaveRecessionFlash FloodPests

🌿 Sustainability

Every Purchase
Plants a Tree

Your support doesn’t stop at the table. A portion of every sale goes directly towards planting native trees in restoration programmes around the world.

Join the Forest Learn how we spend your money →

Help Us Speak Your Language

The Future Farmer is currently only available in English. We want to bring it to classrooms and families everywhere — but translations cost time and money. Back us on Kickstarter to help fund the next language.

🇬🇧 English 🇪🇸 Español 🇫🇷 Français 🇵🇹 Português 🇩🇪 Deutsch 🇨🇳 中文 + More
Support on Kickstarter → Pre-order Now
Questions

Frequently Asked

2 to 6 players. With 2 it’s a tactical head-to-head duel. With 4 or more it gets chaotic, alliances shift, and Challenges fly across the table. Most games settle around 3–4 players as the sweet spot.
About 30–45 minutes for a standard game to 15 PES credits. You can shorten it to 10 PES for a quick round, or raise it to 20 for a longer session. Teachers often run 30-minute rounds that fit neatly into a class period.
Absolutely. The game was designed by a practicing forester and every card — from Agroforestry to Flash Floods — reflects real ecological dynamics. It maps to geography, environmental science, and biology curricula for ages 10 and up. Teacher guides with lesson plans, discussion prompts, and assessment rubrics are included with school packages.
Shipping begins after Kickstarter fulfilment. Pre-order customers are first in the queue and will receive tracking by email. We’ll keep you updated at every stage — production, printing, and dispatch.
Yes. We ship to Europe, the UK, North America, and beyond. Shipping within the EU is included in the price. For other regions, shipping costs are calculated at checkout based on your location.
10% of every sale goes to The Grove — a real 10-hectare restoration site on a degraded dryland slope. Every November, native trees are planted, photographed, and documented. The site is already home to over 210 species. Kickstarter backers at Grove tier and above receive a named tree with annual species reports, survival data, and photos.
PES stands for Payment for Ecosystem Services — a real-world mechanism where landowners are compensated for the environmental benefits their land provides, such as carbon storage, water filtration, or biodiversity. In the game, PES credits are your score: the more resilient and ecologically valuable your farm, the more credits you earn.
53 unique cards across three types: 18 Farm Modules (your farm and production), 21 Innovations (tools and strategies), and 14 Challenges (droughts, pests, recessions). Plus an illustrated rulebook and a tuck-box. Every card features real science, witty flavour text, and beautiful artwork.
Currently the game is only available in English. Portuguese, Spanish, French, German, and Chinese translations are planned, but they depend on funding. Back us on Kickstarter to help make the next language happen.
The Forest Wall is our permanent record of everyone who helped build this project. Every Kickstarter backer is listed as a Founding Backer. Kickstarter backers at The Grove tier and above have their name printed in every future edition of the game. Card Creators — those whose card ideas pass community vote and scientific review — earn the highest honour: their name and card in the game forever.
Yes! All backers can submit card ideas. Each quarter, the top submissions are shortlisted and put to a community vote. Winning cards are reviewed for scientific accuracy and game balance by the forester behind the game. If your card makes it in, you become a Card Creator — your name is on The Forest Wall and in every copy printed.
No. Pre-ordering reserves your copy at launch pricing with no payment taken now. You’ll receive a secure checkout link the day our Kickstarter goes live, with your tier and early-bird savings already applied. You can cancel anytime before then.

A playful card game about resilient farming. Designed in the EU. Shared with the World.

The Future Farmer Card Game 🌿 Your purchase supports native tree planting
No payment now · First 500 copies at €15

Where Your Money Goes

Every €15 you spend on The Future Farmer Card Game is split transparently across three areas. Here’s exactly how it breaks down.

Production 60% (€9.00)
Card printing, packaging, quality control, and shipping to fulfilment centres. This is the largest cost and ensures a premium physical product.
Maintenance 30% (€4.50)
Domain hosting, barcode registration, e-commerce platform fees, payment processing, and funding new game versions and translations.
Native Tree Planting 10% (€1.50)
Funds native tree planting through verified ecological restoration programmes. Every copy sold plants a tree. No greenwashing, no offset schemes.

We believe in full transparency. If you have questions about our cost structure, get in touch.<
